problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: The key to Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? is Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins — specifically Autophagy activation to — which would help 2,100,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
